forecast-period.text: Cloudy. Very high chance of rain. Winds north to northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h. Daytime maximum temperatures between 18 and 23.
Sun protection 11:00am to 1:10pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]

Cloudy. Very high chance of rain, most likely in the morning and afternoon. The chance of a thunderstorm in the afternoon. Winds northerly 15 to 25 km/h tending northwesterly in the morning then becoming light in the early afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 13 with daytime temperatures reaching between 17 and 21.
Partly cloudy. High chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 11 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the evening. Light winds becoming west to northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching between 16 and 19.
Cloudy. Very high chance of rain. The chance of a thunderstorm. Winds north to northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h. Daytime maximum temperatures in the low to mid 20s.
Sun protection 11:10am to 1:10pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]

Partly cloudy. Very high chance of rain, most likely in the morning. The chance of a thunderstorm in the afternoon and evening. Winds northerly 15 to 25 km/h tending northwesterly in the morning then becoming light in the early afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 13 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 20s.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Light winds becoming south to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h during the afternoon then becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 11 with daytime temperatures reaching around 20.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog in the north. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the evening. Light winds becoming westerly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 20.
Cloudy. Very high chance of rain. The chance of a thunderstorm in the west. Winds northerly 15 to 25 km/h. Daytime maximum temperatures around 19.
Sun protection 11:40am to 12:50pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]

Partly cloudy. Very high chance of rain, most likely in the morning and afternoon. The chance of a thunderstorm in the morning and afternoon. Winds north to northwesterly 15 to 25 km/h tending west to northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h in the middle of the day then becoming light in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 14 with daytime temperatures reaching around 19.
Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 11 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers, most likely in the afternoon and evening. Light winds becoming northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning then tending westerly 15 to 25 km/h during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.
Partly cloudy. High chance of showers near the coast, medium chance elsewhere. Winds north to northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h. Daytime maximum temperatures in the low to mid 20s.
Sun protection 11:30am to 12:40pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]

Cloudy. Very high chance of rain, most likely in the morning and afternoon. The chance of a thunderstorm in the afternoon. Winds northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h tending northerly 20 to 30 km/h in the morning then becoming light in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 12 with daytime temperatures reaching around 20.

Cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Light winds becoming southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h during the day then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 11 with daytime temperatures reaching around 20.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the evening. Light winds becoming westerly 15 to 20 km/h during the day then tending northwesterly during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 19.
Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers. Winds northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h turning northerly 15 to 20 km/h in the late evening. Daytime maximum temperatures in the low 20s.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]

Cloudy. Very high chance of rain. The chance of a thunderstorm near the coast in the afternoon. Winds northerly 15 to 25 km/h becoming light in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 12 with daytime temperatures reaching around 19.

Cloudy. High chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Light winds becoming south to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h during the day then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 11 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. High chance of showers, most likely in the evening. Light winds becoming northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.
Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers in the west, slight chance elsewhere. Winds northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h becoming light in the late evening. Daytime maximum temperatures in the mid 20s.
Sun protection 10:50am to 1:10pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]

Cloudy. Very high chance of rain, most likely in the morning and afternoon. The chance of a thunderstorm in the afternoon and evening. Light winds becoming north to northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h in the early morning then becoming light in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 12 with daytime temperatures reaching between 18 and 21.
Cloudy. Medium chance of showers. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 20.
Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Slight chance of a shower. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 9 with daytime temperatures reaching around 20.
Partly cloudy. High chance of showers in the west, slight chance elsewhere. Winds north to northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h. Daytime maximum temperatures in the low to mid 20s.
Sun protection 11:20am to 12:50pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]

Cloudy. Very high chance of rain, most likely in the morning and afternoon. The chance of a thunderstorm in the afternoon and evening. Winds north to northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h becoming light in the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 13 with daytime temperatures reaching between 18 and 21.
Cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 11 with daytime temperatures reaching around 20.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Slight chance of a shower. Light winds becoming westerly 15 to 20 km/h during the day then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 9 with daytime temperatures reaching around 19.

Cloudy. Very high chance of rain, most likely in the late afternoon and evening. Winds northeasterly 20 to 30 km/h turning northerly 15 to 20 km/h during the afternoon and evening. Daytime maximum temperatures in the low to mid 20s.
Sun protection 11:00am to 1:20pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]

Cloudy. Very high chance of rain, most likely in the morning and afternoon. The chance of a thunderstorm in the afternoon and evening. Winds northerly 15 to 25 km/h tending northwesterly in the middle of the day then becoming light in the early afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 10 and 13 with daytime temperatures reaching between 18 and 22.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to between 8 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching between 17 and 21.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Medium chance of showers. Light winds becoming west to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h during the day then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 6 and 10 with daytime temperatures reaching between 16 and 20.

Cloudy. Very high chance of showers, most likely in the late afternoon and evening. The chance of a thunderstorm in the afternoon and evening. Winds north to northeasterly 20 to 30 km/h becoming light in the evening then becoming north to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the late evening. Daytime maximum temperatures between 19 and 25.
Sun protection 10:40am to 1:40pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]

Cloudy. Very high chance of rain, most likely in the morning. The chance of a thunderstorm in the afternoon and evening. Winds north to northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h tending north to northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h in the middle of the day then becoming light in the early afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 10 and 15 with daytime temperatures reaching between 18 and 22.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers. The chance of a thunderstorm north of Hawker in the afternoon and evening. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to between 8 and 13 with daytime temperatures reaching between 17 and 21.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Slight chance of a shower, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Light winds becoming southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h during the day then becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching between 17 and 20.
Cloudy. Very high chance of showers east of Ceduna, medium chance elsewhere. The chance of a thunderstorm. Winds northwest to northeasterly 20 to 30 km/h. Daytime maximum temperatures 21 to 27.
Sun protection 11:00am to 2:00pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the afternoon. The chance of a thunderstorm in the morning and afternoon. Winds northwest to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h tending southwesterly in the morning then tending southerly 15 to 25 km/h in the middle of the day. Overnight temperatures falling to around 12 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 20s.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Slight chance of a shower, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Light winds becoming southerly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 20.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Slight chance of a shower east of Ceduna, near zero chance elsewhere. Light winds becoming west to southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h during the day then becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching between 19 and 22.
Cloudy. Very high chance of rain. The chance of a thunderstorm. Winds northerly 15 to 20 km/h increasing to 20 to 30 km/h in the morning. Daytime maximum temperatures in the low to mid 20s.
Sun protection 10:50am to 1:30pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]

Partly cloudy. Very high chance of showers. A thunderstorm likely in the afternoon and evening. Winds northerly 15 to 25 km/h tending northwesterly in the morning then becoming light in the early afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 13 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 20s.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Light winds becoming south to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h during the day then becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 11 with daytime temperatures reaching between 18 and 21.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Slight chance of a shower. Light winds becoming west to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h during the day then becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 8 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching around 19.
Cloudy. Very high chance of rain, becoming less likely in the evening. The chance of a thunderstorm. Winds northerly 15 to 25 km/h. Daytime maximum temperatures around 20.
Sun protection 11:30am to 1:00pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers, most likely in the afternoon and evening. The chance of a thunderstorm in the afternoon and evening. Winds north to northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h tending west to northwesterly in the middle of the day then becoming light in the early afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 12 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 20s.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Light winds becoming south to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h during the day then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 20.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the afternoon and evening. Light winds becoming westerly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 6 and 9 with daytime temperatures reaching around 20.

Partly cloudy. Very high chance of showers south of Woomera, medium chance elsewhere. The chance of a thunderstorm. Winds northwest to northeasterly 20 to 30 km/h. Daytime maximum temperatures 23 to 29.
Sun protection 10:20am to 2:30pm, UV Index predicted to reach 4 [Moderate]

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers east of Coober Pedy, medium chance elsewhere. The chance of a thunderstorm, possibly severe with damaging winds, large hail and heavy rain which may lead to flash flooding east of Coober Pedy. Winds northwest to northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h tending northwest to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h in the middle of the day then tending southeast to southwesterly in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 11 and 15 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to high 20s.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog south of Coober Pedy. Medium chance of showers north of Marla, slight chance elsewhere. The chance of a thunderstorm east of Stuart Highway in the evening. Winds south to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 9 and 13 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 20s.

Mostly sunny. The chance of morning fog south of Coober Pedy. Slight chance of a shower north of Marla in the morning. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. Winds south to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h tending south to southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h during the day then tending south to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 20s.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers about the Gammon Ranges, slight chance elsewhere. The chance of a thunderstorm in the afternoon and evening. Winds northeasterly 20 to 30 km/h decreasing to 15 to 20 km/h in the late afternoon. Daytime maximum temperatures in the low to mid 20s.
Sun protection 10:10am to 2:10pm, UV Index predicted to reach 4 [Moderate]

Cloudy. Very high chance of rain, most likely in the morning. The chance of a thunderstorm, possibly severe with damaging winds, large hail and heavy rain which may lead to flash flooding west of Leigh Creek in the afternoon and evening. Winds east to northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h tending north to northeasterly in the morning then becoming light in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 13 and 17 with daytime temperatures reaching between 19 and 26.

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. The chance of a thunderstorm. Light winds becoming east to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning then tending south to southeasterly during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to between 10 and 15 with daytime temperatures reaching between 19 and 22.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog south of Yunta. Medium chance of showers in the far northeast, slight chance elsewhere. The chance of a thunderstorm in the far northeast in the afternoon and evening. Winds southerly 15 to 25 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 9 and 15 with daytime temperatures reaching between 19 and 23.
